tasks.summary: Scaffolded npm package: package.json with deps (jsonc-parser, tsx, zod-to-json-schema, peer zod), tsconfig (Node 20+ ESM, strict, noUncheckedIndexedAccess), bin/ripplegraph shim, src/index.ts placeholder, vitest config, .gitignore, README. Typecheck clean. No template content yet (Task 13).

Created src/graph/types.ts (ParsedGraph + node discriminated union + RunState), src/graph/schema.ts (workflowJsonSchema with edge/entry id refinement, mapExpr regex, edge expression contract documented), src/runtime/state-schema.ts (RunState zod for load-time corruption). Typecheck clean.

parseGraph() with JSONC parse, Zod validation, ref resolution, cycle detection (visiting-stack DFS). Named error types: MissingWorkflowError, InvalidWorkflowError, MissingNodeFolderError, MissingSubgraphError, CyclicRefError. 7 unit cases passing.
State store with auto-init run lifecycle, atomic writes, Zod load validation, three named errors. 6 unit cases passing.
resolveWorkNode reads instruction.md, loads schema.ts via tsx, enforces handoff_summary z.string().min(40).max(500) by introspecting _def.checks. Memoized. Four error types.
appendEvent writes markdown transcript entries. TranscriptEventType union covers all design event vocabulary.

graph-walk helper + neighborhood/overview generators. 6 unit cases passing covering top-level structure, you-are-here marker, breadcrumb, prior outputs in full, next nodes with purposes, attempt count.
propose/confirm/pop with modal stack, depth cap 2. Three named errors. 8 unit cases.
MapExpr dot-traversal evaluator + applyInputMap/applyOutputMap. Error on missing path. Subgraph output scope is {outputs, input}.
retry counter primitives + exec audit recorder (writes to transcript).
state command + supporting edges/scope/advance modules. Auto-advances past markers and subgraph descents. Three response shapes (work/complete/pending_confirmation). 27 unit cases still passing.
step command with confirm + output branches, schema validation + retry + user gate, proposed_jump → pending_confirmation, normal edge transition + auto-advance, five response shapes. Typecheck clean.
Templates: AGENT.md.tmpl (full protocol contract) + workflow.json.tmpl. Commands: validate parses+resolves every node; init writes templates with marker-aware --update.
cli.ts argv parser + dispatch + JSON emit + structured error to stderr. --help works.
examples/minimal workflow with subgraph, inline+spawn, free-entry modal, inputMap+outputMap. Also fixed cross-instance zod detection in resolver (duck-typing via _def.typeName).

E2E stub host + minimal acceptance test exercising kickoff, subgraph entry with inputMap, inline+spawn, schema retry, modal jump with confirm, modal pop. Also fixed modal semantics: pending_confirmation now carries resume_path. All 28 tests pass. LOC: 2114 in src/ (over plan's 500-700; estimate was optimistic, functionality matches design).
